task_completion.visual_evidence: The web browser shows the document management system with the 'Finance' workspace open (path should indicate /default-domain/workspaces/Finance).

task_completion.description: View the duplicate documents and their timestamps
task_completion.visual_evidence: The workspace view lists two documents both titled 'Q3 Financials', and their 'Last Modified' dates/times are visible on the screen for comparison.

task_completion.description: Select the older document for deletion
task_completion.visual_evidence: The checkbox or selection indicator is checked specifically for the 'Q3 Financials' document that has the older 'Last Modified' timestamp.

task_completion.description: Move the selected older document to the Trash
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicks a 'Delete', 'Trash', or similar action button, or a success/confirmation toast message appears indicating the document was moved to the trash.

task_completion.description: Ensure the newer document remains active in the workspace
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Finance workspace document list now shows exactly one 'Q3 Financials' document, and its 'Last Modified' timestamp matches the newer version from the initial view.

integrity.description: The agent used the web-based graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a standard web browser interacting with the document management system's UI, rather than terminal windows or API testing tools.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no open terminal windows executing scripts, curl commands, or database queries to delete the document.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely interacted with the application elements.
integrity.visual_evidence: Mouse clicks, selections, and navigation occur through the actual application menus and buttons, without evidence of inspecting/editing the HTML DOM to fake the final state.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The workspace path is '/default-domain/workspaces/Finance'. There are initially two documents titled 'Q3 Financials'. The task requires identifying the older document by its 'Last Modified' timestamp, moving ONLY that older document to the Trash, and leaving the newer 'Q3 Financials' document active in the workspace.
